agent.name: schema-auditor
agent.role: Review Supabase migrations and dashboard data access for the 20260410-182313 batch.

findings.title: repair_service migration DROP POLICY names may not match earlier migration
findings.description: Repo now includes 20260410141000_drop_legacy_repair_jobs_rls_policy.sql, which drops the legacy FOR ALL policy "Users can access repair jobs for their projects" when granular users_can_view_repair_jobs exists. After applying migrations to staging/production, confirm pg_policies on repair_jobs shows only the intended granular policies.

proof_hooks.summary: Conditional DROP of legacy policy when granular policy present

proof_hooks.value: SELECT policyname, cmd, qual IS NOT NULL AS has_using FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename = 'repair_jobs' ORDER BY policyname;

history.notes: data-20260410-182313: follow-up migration added; prior open finding advanced toward verification.

findings.title: penny_audit FK restore uses NOT VALID; schedule VALIDATE CONSTRAINT after backfill confidence
findings.description: 20260410140000_restore_penny_project_fkeys_not_valid.sql re-attaches FKs with NOT VALID so existing rows are not checked at attach time. New rows are enforced; operators should plan VALIDATE CONSTRAINT or a cleanup pass once orphan project_name values are ruled out.

proof_hooks.summary: Header comments document NOT VALID semantics and placeholder backfill

history.notes: data-20260410-182313; new migration in working tree.

next_actions.action: Apply 20260410141000 to hosted Supabase and confirm repair_jobs policies; then mark f-6af2fc10 fixed_verified.
next_actions.rationale: Closes policy-name drift once live DB matches repo.

next_actions.action: Document or run VALIDATE CONSTRAINT for penny_audit_* FKs after operational sign-off.
next_actions.rationale: Restores full referential checking on historical rows.

next_actions.action: Keep f-58c68aa7 (GRANT breadth) aligned with narrowed GRANT decision after policy review.
